tailorExplanation.paragraph: I treated this as a Software Engineer at Curate Partners draft and made SQL, Python, and React easy to find. You already had the right raw material: SQL, Python, React, and data. I pushed that proof forward in Centi – Personal Finance App, Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser, and SentimentTrader - Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline. I trimmed Bar Louie Server, SecureScape – Smart Security System, ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection, and Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website because they were weaker signals for this read. The biggest help here: kept the projects that best prove the role fit, reframed your experience around the job's strongest signals, and gave the summary a clearer role-specific angle. Under the hood, I changed the summary, experience, projects, skills, the section order, and which sections show based on those signals.

details.title: Why it changed
items: Target story: Proven experience in building scalable backend services and data pipelines using Python and SQL, with a strong emphasis on automation and data integr...
Main evidence themes: workflow / automation, metrics / reporting, and compliance / standards.

details.title: Worth checking
items: Some JD terms were not directly evidenced: data engineering, azure, frontend, and data analysis.
Review the skills list; a few useful-but-lower-priority skills may have been trimmed.
Some generic phrasing may still be worth tightening.

subsections.Relevant Coursework: Massive Storage & Big Data, Enterprise Computing, Object-Oriented Software Design

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description:
• Developed backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Contributed to system design and architecture discussions with senior engineers, focusing on scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Created React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, enhancing visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.
experience.skills: Python, Django, React, PostgreSQL, AWS EC2

projects.title: Centi – Personal Finance App
projects.description:
• Developed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing insights through a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Created responsive React dashboards for account management and financial analytics, improving user experience.
• Implemented secure data handling practices (OAuth/JWT) to protect user financial data.

projects.title: Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser
projects.description:
• Developed an AI-powered resume platform that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured profile data.
• Built backend services for parsing, authentication, and export workflows using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
• Designed a real-time editing interface in React, allowing users to customize resume content.
• Integrated OpenAI API for automated content generation, streamlining the resume extraction and editing process.

projects.title: SentimentTrader -  Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline
projects.description:
• Engineered a comprehensive ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analysis, processing over 1,000 Reddit finance posts per run through multi-stage ETL.
• Leveraged NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to generate 40+ predictive features per ticker, training XGBoost models with 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Developed modular components for data ingestion, transformation, and model inference, aligned with message-driven architectures for scalability.
• Automated data collection and preprocessing workflows, enabling efficient real-time analytics.

summary.summary: Software Engineer with a strong focus on backend development and data engineering. Proficient in Python and SQL, with a proven track record of building scalable data pipelines and backend services. Experienced in integrating React for user interfaces and optimizing workflows for real-time data processing.

summary.before: Full-stack engineer specializing in scalable data pipelines, platforms, and backend services. Skilled in React, Python, and Java, with strong database and API expertise. Passionate about turning complex data into reliable, user-focused applications.
summary.after: Software Engineer with a strong focus on backend development and data engineering. Proficient in Python and SQL, with a proven track record of building scalable data pipelines and backend services. Experienced in integrating React for user interfaces and optimizing workflows for real-time data processing.

description.before:
• Built and maintained backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django supporting secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design, requirements, and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, improving system scalability and reducing latency by ~40%.
description.after:
• Developed backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Contributed to system design and architecture discussions with senior engineers, focusing on scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Created React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, enhancing visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.

before.title: Server
before.description:
• Adapting to high-pressure situations and thriving under stress.
• Effective communication with guests, kitchen, and bar teams.
• Working seamlessly in fast-paced collaborative environments.

description.before:
• Built and deployed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation, transaction tracking, and spending insights across a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.
• Developed responsive React dashboards and authentication flows for account management, transaction review, and financial analytics.
• Implemented authentication and secure data handling (OAuth/JWT), ensuring protected access to financial data and user account workflows.
• Made it secure n stuff.
description.after:
• Developed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing insights through a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Created responsive React dashboards for account management and financial analytics, improving user experience.
• Implemented secure data handling practices (OAuth/JWT) to protect user financial data.

description.before:
• Built an AI-powered resume platform that automates parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured, editable profile data.
• Implemented backend services for parsing, authentication, and export workflows using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
• Created a live editing and preview experience in React, enabling users to customize resume content in real time through  a clean, guided interface.
• Integrated OpenAI API for structured parsing and content generation, enabling automated resume extraction and  editing workflows.
description.after:
• Developed an AI-powered resume platform that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured profile data.
• Built backend services for parsing, authentication, and export workflows using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
• Designed a real-time editing interface in React, allowing users to customize resume content.
• Integrated OpenAI API for automated content generation, streamlining the resume extraction and editing process.

before.title: SecureScape – Smart Security System
before.description:
• Developed the Flutter mobile app with core controls including alarm toggling, lighting, photo capture, and recording  access.
• Built the Python backend and communication layer for device coordination, enabling reliable messaging and near real time alerts (<3.5s).

before.title: ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection
before.description:
• Detects products in crowded retail shelf photos using ResNet-50 and FPN features.
• Handles overlapping items with smart anchor matching and IoU-based detection algorithms.
• Benchmarked on SKU-110K dataset with comprehensive metrics and YOLOv5 comparisons.

before.title: Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website
before.description:
• Built a custom motorsport portfolio site translating brand identity and racing history into a polished, mobile-first  experience.
• Developed interactive UI sections including an animated hero, editorial about page, career timeline, team history,  championship highlights, and image galleries with lightbox support.

description.before:
• Designed and implemented an end-to-end production-style ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analytics, processing 1K+ Reddit finance posts per run via multi-stage ETL.
• Applied NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to build 40+ predictive features per ticker; trained XGBoost models achieving 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Built modular components for data ingestion, transformation, model inference, and distributed-style batching, aligned with message-driven architectures.
• Automated end-to-end data collection, preprocessing, and model inference workflows, enabling scalable real-time analytics.
description.after:
• Engineered a comprehensive ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analysis, processing over 1,000 Reddit finance posts per run through multi-stage ETL.
• Leveraged NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to generate 40+ predictive features per ticker, training XGBoost models with 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Developed modular components for data ingestion, transformation, and model inference, aligned with message-driven architectures for scalability.
• Automated data collection and preprocessing workflows, enabling efficient real-time analytics.
